objective: Implement the canonical triage workflow kernel: TriageTask, ReviewSession, claim-heartbeat-release law, stale-owner recovery, TaskLaunchContext wiring, and append-only task command settlement audit.
authoritativeSourceSections: prompt/shared_operating_contract_228_to_235.md#5.4 `231` implements triage state and lease law
forbiddenLocalShortcuts: Do not infer writability from route presence alone.
Do not treat local UI selection as claim authority.
Do not mutate endpoint consequence fields directly on TriageTask outside the frozen refs.
Do not implement stale-owner takeover without append-only audit and fencing-token checks.
mandatoryTests: claim rejects stale fencing token and stale ownership epoch
heartbeat refresh does not silently revive a released or superseded session
release emits append-only audit and never deletes prior settlement records
stale-owner recovery is explicit, replay-safe, and traceable
failClosedConditions: Missing current ReviewSession or mismatched fencing token blocks mutation.
Attempted takeover without explicit stale-owner recovery record blocks mutation.
Missing audit append or settlement witness blocks task transition.
temporarySeams: Emit stable domain-kernel exports for claim and release transitions so sibling tracks can compile against interfaces before full runtime integration.
